help: Field description entries for an externally described file. Adds RPG function to a field of the external description.

parameters.name: EXTFIELD
parameters.help: The name of the field as defined in the external description.

parameters.name: FIELDNAME
parameters.help: The name used inside the program, when the field is renamed.

parameters.name: CTLLEVEL
parameters.help: L1-L9. Marks the field that causes a control break.

parameters.name: MATCHFLD
parameters.help: M1-M9. Used to match records across files.

parameters.name: FLDIND
parameters.help: Indicators set when the field is plus, minus, zero, or blank.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
